commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch strips plaintext provider apiKey values from generated models.json output, migrates old models.json-only keys into auth-profiles.json, and adds planner/write regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main preserves and serializes provider apiKey values in merge mode, and the PR's blank configured-key path can be traced through hasConfiguredProviderApiKey without running the read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can adjust the migration guard and add one focused regression test without a product decision.

target.title: fix(agents): strip plaintext model provider keys
target.author: pcdqc

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
